# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This repository is a personal portfolio website for Eric Okemwa, hosted on GitHub Pages at [erokemwa.github.io](https://erokemwa.github.io). It is a static site built with plain HTML, SCSS/CSS, and vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks or build tools beyond the SCSS compiler.

## Repository Structure

- `index.html` — Single-page application; all sections (Home, About, Portfolio, Blogs, Contact) are rendered here and toggled via JavaScript.
- `app.js` — Handles section navigation (control buttons), light/dark theme toggling, and fetching Medium blog posts via RSS.
- `styles/styles.scss` — Main stylesheet using SCSS with CSS custom properties for theming. Imports `_media.scss` for responsive styles.
- `styles/_media.scss` — Responsive / media query styles.
- `styles/styles.css` / `styles/styles.css.map` — Compiled CSS output (generated from SCSS; do not edit directly).
- `img/` — Static image assets used in the portfolio.
- `.github/workflows/static.yml` — GitHub Actions workflow that deploys the site to GitHub Pages on every push to `main`.

## Technology & Conventions

- **HTML**: Semantic HTML5. Keep accessibility in mind (use meaningful `alt` attributes on images, proper heading hierarchy).
- **CSS/SCSS**: Uses SCSS with nesting and CSS custom properties (variables defined in `:root`). Dark mode is the default; light mode is toggled by adding `.light-mode` to `<body>`. Always edit `.scss` source files, never the compiled `.css` directly.
- **JavaScript**: Vanilla ES6+ (no frameworks). Use `const`/`let`, arrow functions, and template literals as the existing code does. Keep all code wrapped in an IIFE to avoid polluting the global scope.
- **No package manager**: There is no `package.json`. Do not add npm/yarn dependencies.

## Deployment

The site is deployed automatically to GitHub Pages via the `static.yml` workflow when changes are pushed to the `main` branch. No manual build step is required.

## Editing Guidelines

- When modifying styles, edit the `.scss` files. The `.css` files should be regenerated by running `sass styles/styles.scss styles/styles.css` (requires `sass` CLI).
- Keep all sections within `index.html` — do not split into multiple HTML pages.
- The primary accent color is `--color-secondary` (`#27AE60` in dark mode, `#F56692` in light mode). Use this variable for highlights and interactive elements.
- Maintain the existing responsive breakpoints in `_media.scss` when adding new UI components.
